name: WritersProof for GitHub
tagline: Cryptographic proof that your code and docs were human-authored
description: WritersProof for GitHub adds cryptographic authorship attestation to commits, pull requests, issues, and documentation. Install as a GitHub App to automatically verify that contributed content carries valid proof-of-process evidence. WritersProof captures tamper-evident proof of the content creation process without storing actual content — only SHA-256 hashes. Maintainers gain confidence that contributions were genuinely human-authored, while contributors build a verifiable track record of original work across repositories.
features: GitHub App with webhook-driven attestation verification on push and PR events
Commit-level authorship attestation linked to WritersProof evidence chains
Pull request status checks showing attestation coverage per changed file
Issue and discussion comment attestation for policy-sensitive repositories
Repository-level attestation dashboard with per-contributor breakdowns
Branch protection rule integration requiring attestation on merge
API access for CI/CD pipelines to query attestation status programmatically

requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari with WritersProof browser extension
